headline: Healthcare (XLV) hits 52-wk highs on rare breadth breakout; Semis recover post-June-selloff; XLC the clear avoid at -9.8% YTD — all eyes on Thu NFP + Fed Chair Warsh.
Micron's blowout AI memory earnings reset semis bullish while hawkish Warsh + 68% Sept hike odds crush gold miners and REITs; May PCE report today is the week's override risk.
